provenance.notes: Illustrative example only, included in this reusable-library repository purely to show the TilePalette shape. Production TilePalette instances are authored and owned in rpgmakerLSP (the RPG Maker MZ engine adapter), per contract/README.md 'Explicit Boundaries', not in AtlasStudio.
